title: Implement maintenance commands in Rust
description: Implement validate and stats in Rust.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implemented Rust maintenance commands: added maintenance module with validate_project and collect_project_stats, wired CLI validate/stats output, and added Rust tests for validation and stats counts. Tests: cargo fmt --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml, cargo test --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml --test maintenance.
